overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a medieval village at night. The player moves along dirt paths between wooden fences and stone buildings, encountering NPCs carrying torches. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with warm torchlight illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village path between wooden fence and stone wall

events.description: villager carrying lantern appears walking toward camera from the left side
lantern-bearing villager passes by the camera and exits frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the village center, observing surroundings

notable_agents.action: villager carrying lantern walks past the camera on the left side, illuminating the path

entered.detail: weathered wooden picket fence running along the left side of the path
rough stone retaining wall with grass growing on top
medieval stone building with small windows and sloped roof

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt path bordered by a wooden fence on the left and a stone wall on the right. A villager carrying a lantern approaches from the left and passes by, providing the primary light source in the dark village setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden walkway between high walls

events.description: path narrows into enclosed wooden plank walkway with overhead branches forming a canopy

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the narrow covered passage with wooden flooring

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway with steps forming a narrow passage
tree branches and leaves forming a canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The path transitions into a narrow, enclosed walkway with wooden plank flooring. Overhead branches and walls block most of the sky, creating a sheltered, tunnel-like atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: village lane with parked covered wagon

events.description: exiting narrow passage into wider lane with covered wagon visible on right side
passing the covered wagon on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past the covered wagon and continuing along the village lane toward open fields

entered.detail: large wooden covered wagon with canvas top and spoked wheels parked by the wall
tall church spire visible against the night sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage into a wider village lane. A large covered wagon sits on the right side of the path, and a church spire is visible in the distance against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village outskirts with scattered buildings

events.description: second NPC with torch appears ahead walking toward camera
passing the second NPC carrying a torch in red tunic
approaching third NPC with bow and torch who turns to face camera

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing villagers and approaching an armed figure

notable_agents.action: villager in red tunic carrying torch walks toward and past the camera
armored archer with torch and bow stands by the path facing the camera

entered.detail: small medieval house with plaster walls and wooden roof on the left side

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open outskirts of the village, passing a villager with a torch. The path continues toward another figure standing by the roadside, who turns to reveal a bow and armor as the camera approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark medieval village, moving from narrow, enclosed corridors into the open outskirts. It begins along a tight dirt path bordered by a wooden fence and stone wall, where the darkness is momentarily broken by a passing villager carrying a lantern. As the camera advances, the terrain shifts into a sheltered, tunnel-like walkway with wooden plank flooring and overhanging branches that block out the night sky. The scene then opens into a wider village lane featuring a large covered wagon and a distant church spire before expanding further into the open outskirts. Finally, the camera passes a torch-bearing villager and approaches a roadside figure who turns to reveal armor and a bow.
